4
Page architecture
app/profile/page.tsx
├── SectionNav (sticky — Profile | Generate | Scorecard | Vouches | Applications | Settings)
├── ProfileHeader          (S1) ← getMe + getCandidateProfile
├── GenerateScorecardSection (S1b) ← sync + analyse with 24hr gate [NEW]
│   ├── GitHub sync row    ← getLinkedGithub + triggerGithubSync
│   ├── Wallet link row    ← getLinkedWallet
│   └── Generate CTA       ← startAnalysis (gated by getAnalysisCooldown)
├── ScorecardSection       (S2) ← state machine wrapper
│   ├── [state=empty]  — CTA defers to GenerateScorecardSection above
│   ├── [state=loading] AnalysisPoller
│   └── [state=done]   ScorecardView         ← SHARED COMPONENT
├── VouchesSection         (S3) ← from scorecard cache
├── ApplicationsSection    (S4) ← getMyApplications
└── SettingsAccordion      (S5) ← Linked Accounts + Wallet + MFA + Danger [sync REMOVED]

Shared components created here (reused elsewhere):
  components/ScorecardView/index.tsx   → also used in /u/:username, /hr/jobs/:id
  components/AnalysisPoller/index.tsx  → only used here
  lib/hooks/useWalletFlow.ts           → also used in /u/:username VouchForm
Redirect required
Add to next.config.ts: { source: '/scorecard', destination: '/profile', permanent: true }. Old route removed.

Shared state — scorecard cache
Vouches section reads from the same ['scorecard'] React Query key. No second API call. staleTime: Infinity — once loaded, never re-fetch on focus.

Animation system
Capability bars: Framer Motion staggered width animation. Scorecard state transitions: AnimatePresence mode="wait". Settings accordion: shadcn native. Section nav: smooth scroll on click.

SessionStorage persistence
Analysis jobId stored in sessionStorage('analysis_job_id'). On refresh mid-analysis, state machine reads this and resumes polling. Cleared when analysis completes.

24hr sync + generate rate gate
GET /api/analysis/cooldown returns per-action nextAvailableAt timestamps (github, wallet, generate). Client derives isOnCooldown = Date.now() < nextAvailableAt. Server enforces: any duplicate trigger within 24h returns HTTP 429 with nextAvailableAt. Client shows countdown in GenerateScorecardSection buttons.
